description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a semi-circular arrangement of trees. The exterior features a mix of light-colored stone or brick and white plaster, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. A spacious outdoor terrace with seating and a swimming pool is visible, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and relaxation. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway with parking for multiple vehicles and a covered entrance. The rear and side facades are characterized by expansive glass panels and shaded patio areas. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a row of trees providing privacy and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a swimming pool, and a semi-circular tree arrangement, featuring a mix of stone and white plaster exteriors.
description_view_0: Shows the main facade with large windows, a covered entrance, and a driveway with parked cars, as well as the row of trees behind the bungalow.
description_view_1: Highlights the side of the bungalow with the swimming pool and terrace, and the curved line of trees wrapping around the property.
description_view_2: Displays the rear of the bungalow with a shaded patio, outdoor seating, and the pool, with trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Presents the driveway, garage entrance, and the front terrace, with cars parked and the pool visible to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
